rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §38.0231, which governs digital device guidelines in schools. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 38.0231. GUIDELINES FOR USE OF DIGITAL DEVICES.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns school digital device guidelines, unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
